skill.name: resume-optimizer
skill.description: Resume optimization guidance for matching a resume to a job description, improving content, and preparing interview questions.
skill.summary: Optimize resumes against job descriptions and prepare for interviews.
skill.author: Hermes-Sedimentary

security_audit.summary: The static weak-cryptography alert at SKILL.md:4 is a false positive; the line is a Chinese description of resume optimization. The entropy alert at SKILL.md:1 is also a false positive because the file is plain Markdown with front matter and no executable, encrypted, or binary content.

low_findings.title: Static Weak Cryptography Alert Dismissed
low_findings.description: The flagged line contains the skill description text, not cryptographic code or a weak algorithm. No evidence found of hashing, encryption, credential handling, or security-sensitive processing.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: The exact cited line is only descriptive Chinese text about resume matching and interview preparation. There is no cryptographic API, algorithm name, or executable logic in the file.

low_findings.title: Static High Entropy Alert Dismissed
low_findings.description: The file content is readable Markdown with YAML-style metadata and user guidance. No evidence found of binary payloads, encoded commands, encrypted content, or obfuscated instructions.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: Manual review shows normal front matter and short Chinese documentation. The entropy signal is likely caused by non-ASCII text, not obfuscation.

content.user_title: Optimize Your Resume for Target Roles
content.value_statement: Job seekers often struggle to connect resume evidence with a specific job description. This skill reviews fit, suggests focused improvements, and prepares likely interview questions.
actual_capabilities: Compares resume content against a provided job description.
Identifies missing keywords, weak evidence, and role alignment gaps.
Suggests clearer bullet points and stronger achievement framing.
Predicts interview questions based on resume and role requirements.
Provides practical revision guidance for job seekers and teams.
limitations: Does not guarantee interviews, offers, or recruiter responses.
Requires accurate resume and job description input from the user.
Cannot verify employment history, metrics, or credentials.
Outputs should be reviewed before submission to employers.

use_cases.title: Tailor a Resume for One Role
use_cases.description: Analyze a resume against a specific job description and get targeted edits.

use_cases.title: Improve Candidate Materials
use_cases.description: Help candidates present relevant skills, projects, and outcomes more clearly.

use_cases.title: Prepare Internal Applicants
use_cases.description: Review employee resumes for role fit and likely interview topics.

prompt_templates.title: Basic Resume Review
prompt_templates.prompt: Review my resume for clarity, structure, and impact. List the top improvements I should make first.
prompt_templates.scenario: Beginner review without a job description

prompt_templates.title: Match Resume to Job Description
prompt_templates.prompt: Compare my resume with this job description. Identify matched skills, missing requirements, and priority edits.

prompt_templates.title: Rewrite Bullet Points
prompt_templates.prompt: Rewrite these resume bullets to emphasize measurable outcomes, relevant skills, and concise action verbs.

prompt_templates.title: Full Application Strategy
prompt_templates.prompt: Analyze my resume and target role. Create a resume edit plan, keyword strategy, and likely interview questions.
prompt_templates.scenario: Advanced preparation for a competitive role

output_examples.input: A software resume and a backend engineer job description.
output: Matched strengths: API development, databases, and cloud deployment.
Gaps: add examples for observability, scalability, and incident response.
Priority edit: quantify performance improvements and production ownership.

output_examples.input: Three resume bullets for a product manager role.
output: Revised bullets use clearer action verbs and measurable business outcomes.
Weak task descriptions are changed into impact-focused statements.
The recommendations keep the candidate's original experience accurate.

output_examples.input: A resume summary for a marketing analyst role.
output_examples.output: The summary is shortened, role keywords are added, and vague claims are replaced with evidence-based strengths.

best_practices: Provide the full resume and the exact job description for best results.
Keep suggested edits truthful and based on real experience.
Review every recommendation before sending the resume to employers.
anti_patterns: Do not invent skills, employers, certifications, or performance metrics.
Do not use the same resume version for every role.
Do not paste sensitive personal data unless it is needed for review.

faq.question: Can this skill rewrite my resume?
faq.answer: It can suggest stronger wording and structure, but you should approve all final changes.

faq.question: Does it work with job descriptions?
faq.answer: Yes. It is most useful when you provide the target job description.

faq.question: Can it improve ATS keyword matching?
faq.answer: It can identify relevant keywords and missing requirements from the job description.

faq.question: Will it guarantee an interview?
faq.answer: No. It improves resume quality, but hiring outcomes depend on many factors.

faq.question: Can recruiters use this skill?
faq.answer: Yes. Recruiters and coaches can use it to give clearer feedback to candidates.

faq.question: Should I include personal data?
faq.answer: Only include information needed for the review. Remove unnecessary private details.
